pool.baseline:
Hey, i'm looking at this NDA my new contractor sent over and it's kind of a lot of legalese. can u just give me a quick summary of the main parts? like what exactly am i not allowed to talk about and how long does this thing last? thanks.

[TEXT START]
NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT
This Non-Disclosure Agreement (the "Agreement") is entered into as of October 12, 2023, by and between Nexus Solutions LLC ("Disclosing Party") and Jordan Miller ("Receiving Party").

1. DEFINITION OF CONFIDENTIAL INFORMATION. "Confidential Information" shall mean any and all non-public, proprietary, or sensitive information, including but not limited to trade secrets, client lists, software code, business strategies, and financial data, disclosed by the Disclosing Party, whether orally or in writing.

2. OBLIGATIONS OF RECEIVING PARTY. The Receiving Party agrees to hold the Confidential Information in strict confidence and shall not disclose, publish, or permit the use of such information for any purpose other than the performance of services for the Disclosing Party.

3. TERM AND TERMINATION. This Agreement shall commence on the Effective Date and shall remain in effect for a period of three (3) years from the date of initial disclosure, notwithstanding the termination of any underlying service relationship.

4. REMEDIES. The Receiving Party acknowledges that any breach of this Agreement may cause irreparable harm to the Disclosing Party, for which monetary damages may be inadequate, and the Disclosing Party shall be entitled to seek injunctive relief.
[TEXT END]
